# Paketti — cross-orifice coverage (what's left on the table)

*Auto-generated by `.spine/build.py`. The three doors to a feature — keyboard / MIDI / menu — matched by action name. A feature behind one door is unreachable through the others.*

## 11,627 distinct actions

| reachable by | count | meaning |
|---|--:|---|
| **KME** | 305 | all three |
| **KE** | 989 | keyboard + menu (no MIDI) |
| **KM** | 3,573 | keyboard + MIDI (no menu) |
| **ME** | 45 | MIDI + menu (no keyboard) |
| **K** | 2,725 | keyboard ONLY |
| **E** | 1,772 | menu ONLY (mouse-only) |
| **M** | 2,218 | MIDI ONLY |

- Keyboard 7,592 · MIDI 6,141 · Menu 3,111
- **Shortcut but NO MIDI:** 3,714 (controller users can't reach)
- **Shortcut but NO menu:** 6,298 (undiscoverable by browsing)
- **Menu but NO shortcut:** 1,817 (mouse-only)
